examples.title: ARIES Analysis Phase
examples.code:
PROCEDURE AnalysisPhase(checkpoint_lsn):
  INIT TransactionTable, DirtyPageTable
  SCAN Log from checkpoint_lsn
  FOR EACH log_record:
    UPDATE TransactionTable
    TRACK DirtyPages
  RETURN (TransactionTable, DirtyPageTable)
examples.explanation: Builds transaction and page state by scanning logs from checkpoint
